conventions_srcutils_998647416968.content: Utility modules follow a typed Options interface pattern (e.g., debounce, retry, configValidator) with named exports and JSDoc comments.

conventions_srcutilsresultts_99864880209.content: Use Result<T, E> discriminated union (Ok/Err) from src/utils/result.ts for explicit error handling instead of throwing.

conventions_testing_998650110755.content: Tests co-located next to source (configValidator.test.ts beside configValidator.ts), using describe/it blocks, vi.fn(), and beforeEach/afterEach for cleanup.

facts_kody_cli_998651214970.content: The @kody command prefix must precede all kody invocations; bare commands without @kody fail to parse with a usage error.
